title: eroteum lanatum
side_effects: Eroteum lanatum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions. If ingested in large amounts, it can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can cause skin irritation, itchiness, and rashes. In extreme cases, improper use of eroteum lanatum can even trigger anaphylaxis, a severe and potentially life-threatening allergic reaction.
